title: Interferons Viruses
script_summary: Exploring the role of interferons in combating viruses and their significance in scientific research.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about interferons versus viruses.
Interferons are proteins produced by cells in response to viral infections.
They signal neighboring cells to boost their defenses, creating a viral shield.
Studies show interferons can limit virus replication and enhance immune responses.
But did you know? Some viruses have evolved to evade this defense!
Research is ongoing, revealing interferons' potential in treatments for diseases like COVID-19.
Curious for more? Hit that follow button for the latest in science!
